$comment: Blueprint challenges: optional prompt cards, LEGO-idea-book style. Completing one stamps a cosmetic badge — no gates, no currency, ids are public (saved) so never rename/delete, only add. Condition types live in core/challenges.ts. After editing run: npm run validate:content

challenges.name: Spy Starter Kit
challenges.blurb: Every agent needs the basics: somewhere to sleep, cook, and wash up.

challenges.name: Science Wing
challenges.blurb: Put a laboratory right next to the library. For very serious research.

challenges.name: Rocket Ready
challenges.blurb: A rocket silo, a command center, and a garage. Just in case.

challenges.name: Going Deep
challenges.blurb: Build on at least four different floors.

challenges.name: Tiny But Mighty
challenges.blurb: A complete little base: five to eight rooms, all connected.

challenges.name: Maximum Cozy
challenges.blurb: Six or more rooms, every single one in the Cozy style.

challenges.name: The Menagerie
challenges.blurb: Sharks, puppies, and a dinosaur under one roof.

challenges.name: The Grand Hotel
challenges.blurb: Three bedrooms, a dining hall, and an elevator for the guests.

challenges.name: Movie Night
challenges.blurb: A theater with the buffet right next door. Snacks come first.

challenges.name: Mega Base
challenges.blurb: Fifteen rooms or more, all connected. One giant secret world.
